textByHash.001ceed1925f6d9a0a0a857e88a96ef5ab532f5c: The gods say they'll protect your ammunition in the same way that this better chicken would, while you're fighting in Castle Wars.
textByHash.0073b048cf3773a6d89ab100893d2391c637dbdc: Bear in mind that you only need to be wearing it when you enter the game to get the benefit.
textByHash.05fbdfc78c742c4850a17bc752dae78ef0118809: Good day, how may I help you?
textByHash.0c93b757c8037f6a0af5b4f22368b9e4e8b3defe: You wouldn't catch me double-crossing a witch!
textByHash.0e1da07077b1d45e88809e1a9459cee8e187d66f: The aim is to get into your opponents' castle and take their team standard. Then bring that back and capture it on your team's standard.
textByHash.171fc9920cdf812f2107013a6c2565bcf5b9467f: If you'd prefer, if you give the bracelet to me, I can grant you the buff instead, but I'll only do it once for each charge you give me.
textByHash.1ae549e54163590f073db00578d539cf91a9ea34: Of course, there are always rules. Firstly you can't wear a cape as you enter the portal, you'll be given your team colours to wear while in the arena. You're also prohibited from taking non-combat related items in with you. So you should only have equipment, potions, and runes on you. Secondly, attacking your own team or your team's defences isn't allowed. You don't want to be angering your patron god, do you? Other than that, just have fun and enjoy it!
textByHash.1fb4c14a729880b3e92e78c99bc8929c34f10d5a: This is the great Castle Wars arena! Here you can fight for the glory of Saradomin or Zamorak.
textByHash.3104210b78c339e1dae9f9c7136f2ee9cc2ab82f: I remember you! You showed me this dead chicken device before, but this one is better is it!?
textByHash.392c15b98baa75e7c7586d2dd2930b6a4091c072: I remember you. You said your dead chicken could help you save ammunition. The gods agreed that you could have the same bonus in Castle Wars without needing to wear the chicken.
textByHash.3bbce0418793a064d1ac32f0c325fa27d4d1fdce: Currently, I'm storing charges for you. If you hand me more bracelets, I can store more charges for you.
textByHash.4917b230c00cddea0ae1ca47d931e277f7b77dda: Players on the winning team will receive 2 Castle Wars Tickets which you can trade back to me for other items. In the event of a draw every player will get 1 ticket.
textByHash.928334de624305620efd7eb6f8ba8fe88ca8108c: ... I'm looking at the dead chicken. Why am I looking at the dead chicken?
textByHash.97dbb6969dc41cdbe307a1e3797c6da669441fbc: Yes, if you're wearing one when you enter a game of Castle Wars, it will use one charge to empower your attacks against flag bearers and give you increased healing from bandages.
textByHash.97e7261b9507064bc7c9ace10c44c36c41058b06: Easy, you just step through one of the three portals. To join Zamorak, pass through the red portal. To join Saradomin, pass through the blue portal. If you don't mind then pass through the green portal.
textByHash.9bda25852e485460ec1e26458650217828fa2387: The gods say they'll protect your ammunition in the same way that the chicken would, while you're fighting in Castle Wars. You won't need to wear the chicken here.
textByHash.a7f88cc73a8b34282db52fd61d1f29466a874efc: Easy Pete, calm down. Don't lose your head!
textByHash.b96bb7140add9cb4280d9ccfc99b4c21726f00dc: Oh. Gosh. That's clever. So are you wanting to take it into Castle Wars? The gods expect people to fight in the team capes.
textByHash.c5d5655960648594cd6d54c144f51a2526d75936: So you don't need to keep showing me the dead chicken, do you? Take it away!
textByHash.c716cdba0d4160752df9da0124f08f84595c78d5: That seems like a strange thing to ask for, but very well, I'll stop using your stored bracelet charges on you. Talk to me if you want to start using them again.
textByHash.c791a7593bf8897fb78da482049ce2870de49fe6: Take care and say hi to the kids for me.
textByHash.d453587bb2cc41925df784ecc6b929a57513091a: Just show me the bracelet and I'll take it off your hands.
textByHash.d69965af359065c9a6da5ec79925bb13170e7d52: I'll ask. Hold on a minute...
textByHash.d6b24a61e5215b7005185a9cda5e90d05e923389: Ah, that's more like it! Yes, I'll start using your stored bracelet charges on you if you don't have a Castle Wars bracelet equipped when a game starts. Talk to me again if you decide you'd rather not have me do that.
